   233→            "title": f"{concept_name} 조정기와 회복기 전환 사례",
   234→            "summary": "수요 급증 이후 공급이 빠르게 늘며 재고가 쌓였고, 가격 하락이 이어졌어요.",
   235→            "outcome": "바닥 신호가 먼저 나타나도 시장은 추가 확인을 요구해서 반등이 지연될 수 있었어요.",
   236→            "lesson": "재고 감소는 선행 신호이고 가격 반등은 후행 신호라는 시차를 분리해서 봐야 해요.",
   237→        }
   238→    }
   239→
   240→
   241→def _mock_narrative(curated: dict, pp: dict, hc: dict) -> dict:
   242→    stock_names = [

   264→                "content": "과거 사례에서도 재고 감소와 가격 반등 사이에 시차가 있었어요.",
   265→                "bullets": ["재고 지표 개선이 먼저 나타났어요", "가격과 실적 확인 후 주가 반응이 본격화됐어요"],
   266→                "viz_hint": "dual_line - 재고 지표 vs 가격/주가",
   267→            },
   268→            "application": {
   269→                "purpose": "과거 교훈을 현재 상황에 적용",
   270→                "content": "현재도 재고 조정의 진전이라는 닮은 점이 있지만, 고부가 제품 경쟁력이라는 변수가 더 크게 작동하고 있어요.",
   271→                "bullets": ["닮은 점: 재고 조정 진행", "다른 점: 고부가 제품 주도권 경쟁"],
   272→                "viz_hint": "grouped_bar - 제품군별 매출 비중 비교",
   273→            },
   274→            "caution": {
   275→                "purpose": "반대 시나리오와 리스크 균형 제시",
   276→                "content": "바닥 신호가 나와도 반등 시점은 늦어질 수 있어요.",
   277→                "bullets": [
   278→                    "재고 감소만으로 가격 반등을 단정하기 어려워요",
   279→                    "핵심 제품 품질/고객 인증 일정이 변수예요",
   280→                    "대외 규제 강화는 추가 하방 리스크예요",
   281→                ],
   282→                "viz_hint": None,
   283→            },
   284→            "summary": {
   285→                "purpose": "핵심 요약과 관찰 포인트 제시",
   286→                "content": "### 투자 전에 꼭 확인할 포인트\n- 재고 지표가 연속으로 개선되는지 확인해요.\n- 가격 반등이 단기 반짝인지 지속 신호인지 구분해요.\n- 핵심 고객과 제품 관련 일정 변화를 매일 체크해요.",
   287→                "bullets": ["재고 지표의 연속 개선 여부", "가격 반등의 지속성", "핵심 고객/제품 경쟁력 이벤트"],
   288→                "viz_hint": None,
   289→            },
   290→        }
   291→    }
   292→
   293→
   294→def _mock_hallucination_check(pp: dict, hc: dict, narr: dict) -> dict:
   295→    return {
   296→        "overall_risk": "low",
   297→        "summary": "mock 모드 결과예요. 실제 사실성 검증은 수행하지 않았어요.",
   298→        "issues": [],
   299→        "consistency_checks": [],
   300→        "validated_interface_2": {
   301→            "theme": pp["theme"],
   302→            "one_liner": pp["one_liner"],
   303→            "concept": pp["concept"],
   304→            "historical_case": hc.get("historical_case", hc),
   305→            "narrative": narr.get("narrative", narr),
   306→        },
   307→    }
   308→
   309→
   310→# ── LangGraph 노드들 ──
   311→
   312→@traceable(name="run_page_purpose", run_type="llm",
   313→           metadata={"phase": "interface_2", "phase_name": "내러티브 생성", "step": 1})
   314→def run_page_purpose_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   315→    """Stage 1: theme, one_liner, concept 추출."""
   316→    if state.get("error"):
   317→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   318→
   319→    node_start = time.time()
   320→    logger.info("[Node] run_page_purpose")
   321→
   322→    try:
   323→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   324→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   325→
   326→        if backend == "mock":
   327→            result = _mock_page_purpose(curated)
   328→        else:
   329→            result = call_llm_with_prompt("page_purpose", {
   330→                "curated_context": curated,
   331→            })
   332→
   333→        logger.info("  page_purpose 완료: theme=%s", result.get("theme", "")[:50])
   334→        return {
   335→            "page_purpose": result,
   336→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_page_purpose", time.time() - node_start),
   337→        }
   338→
   339→    except Exception as e:
   340→        logger.error("  page_purpose 실패: %s", e)
   341→        return {
   342→            "error": f"page_purpose 실패: {e}",
   343→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_page_purpose", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   344→        }
   345→
   346→
   347→@traceable(name="run_historical_case", run_type="llm",
   348→           metadata={"phase": "interface_2", "phase_name": "내러티브 생성", "step": 2})
   349→def run_historical_case_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   350→    """Stage 2: 과거 사례 매칭."""
   351→    if state.get("error"):
   352→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   353→
   354→    node_start = time.time()
   355→    logger.info("[Node] run_historical_case")
   356→
   357→    try:
   358→        pp = state["page_purpose"]
   359→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   360→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   361→
   362→        if backend == "mock":
   363→            result = _mock_historical_case(curated, pp)
   364→        else:
   365→            result = call_llm_with_prompt("historical_case", {
   366→                "theme": pp["theme"],
   367→                "one_liner": pp["one_liner"],
   368→                "concept": pp["concept"],
   369→                "curated_context": curated,
   370→            })
   371→
   372→        logger.info("  historical_case 완료")
   373→        return {
   374→            "historical_case": result,
   375→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_historical_case", time.time() - node_start),
   376→        }
   377→
   378→    except Exception as e:
   379→        logger.error("  historical_case 실패: %s", e)
   380→        return {
   381→            "error": f"historical_case 실패: {e}",
   382→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_historical_case", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   383→        }
   384→
   385→
   386→@traceable(name="run_narrative_body", run_type="llm",
   387→           metadata={"phase": "interface_2", "phase_name": "내러티브 생성", "step": 3})
   388→def run_narrative_body_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   389→    """Stage 3: 6단계 내러티브 본문 생성."""
   390→    if state.get("error"):
   391→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   392→
   393→    node_start = time.time()
   394→    logger.info("[Node] run_narrative_body")
   395→
   396→    try:
   397→        pp = state["page_purpose"]
   398→        hc = state["historical_case"]
   399→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   400→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   401→
   402→        if backend == "mock":
   403→            result = _mock_narrative(curated, pp, hc)
   404→        else:
   405→            result = call_llm_with_prompt("narrative_body", {
   406→                "theme": pp["theme"],
   407→                "one_liner": pp["one_liner"],
   408→                "concept": pp["concept"],
   409→                "historical_case": hc.get("historical_case", hc),
   410→                "curated_context": curated,
   411→            })
   412→
   413→        logger.info("  narrative_body 완료")
   414→        return {
   415→            "narrative": result,
   416→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_narrative_body", time.time() - node_start),
   417→        }
   418→
   419→    except JSONResponseParseError as e:
   420→        logger.error(
   421→            "JSON_PARSE_FAILURE narrative_body 실패: prompt=%s provider=%s model=%s detail=%s",
   422→            e.prompt_name,
   423→            e.provider,
   424→            e.model,
   425→            e,
   426→        )
   427→        return {
   428→            "error": (
   429→                "narrative_body 실패: 모델 응답 JSON 불량 "
   430→                f"(prompt={e.prompt_name}, provider={e.provider}, model={e.model})"
   431→            ),
   432→            "metrics": _update_metrics(
   433→                state, "run_narrative_body", time.time() - node_start, "failed"
   434→            ),
   435→        }
   436→    except Exception as e:
   437→        logger.error("  narrative_body 실패: %s", e)
   438→        return {
   439→            "error": f"narrative_body 실패: {e}",
   440→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_narrative_body", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   441→        }
   442→
   443→
   444→@traceable(name="validate_interface2", run_type="llm",
   445→           metadata={"phase": "interface_2", "phase_name": "내러티브 생성", "step": 4})
   446→def validate_interface2_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   447→    """Stage 4: 할루시네이션 체크 + interface2 조립."""
   448→    if state.get("error"):
   449→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   450→
   451→    node_start = time.time()
   452→    logger.info("[Node] validate_interface2")
   453→
   454→    try:
   455→        pp = state["page_purpose"]
   456→        hc = state["historical_case"]
   457→        narr = state["narrative"]
   458→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   459→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   460→        fallback_validated = _build_unvalidated_interface2(pp, hc, narr)
   461→
   462→        if backend == "mock":
   463→            result = _mock_hallucination_check(pp, hc, narr)
   464→        else:
   465→            raw_payload = {
   466→                "curated_context": curated,
   467→                "page_purpose_output": pp,
   468→                "historical_case_output": hc,
   469→                "narrative_output": narr,
   470→            }
   471→            compact_payload = _build_hallucination_check_inputs(curated, pp, hc, narr)
   472→            logger.info(
   473→                "  validate_interface2 입력 축소: %.1fKB -> %.1fKB",
   474→                _json_size(raw_payload) / 1024,
   475→                _json_size(compact_payload) / 1024,
   476→            )
   477→            try:
   478→                result = call_llm_with_prompt("hallucination_check", compact_payload)
   479→            except Exception as hallcheck_exc:
   480→                err_text = str(hallcheck_exc).lower()
   481→                if "timed out" in err_text or "timeout" in err_text:
   482→                    logger.warning(
   483→                        "  validate_interface2 hallcheck timeout -> fallback 사용: %s",
   484→                        hallcheck_exc,
   485→                    )
   486→                    result = {
   487→                        "overall_risk": "medium",
   488→                        "summary": "hallucination_check timeout으로 검증을 건너뛰고 원본 출력을 사용했어요.",
   489→                        "issues": [],
   490→                        "consistency_checks": [],
   491→                        "validated_interface_2": fallback_validated,
   492→                    }
   493→                else:
   494→                    raise
   495→
   496→        # validated_interface_2 추출 (불완전한 경우 fallback 사용)
   497→        # hallucination_check 응답이 토큰 한도로 잘릴 경우 validated_interface_2가 누락/불완전할 수 있음
   498→        _REQUIRED_NARRATIVE_SECTIONS = frozenset(NARRATIVE_SECTION_KEYS)
   499→        validated = result.get("validated_interface_2", fallback_validated)
   500→        _narrative = validated.get("narrative") if isinstance(validated, dict) else None
   501→        _narrative_complete = (
   502→            isinstance(_narrative, dict)
   503→            and _REQUIRED_NARRATIVE_SECTIONS.issubset(_narrative.keys())
   504→        )
   505→        if not isinstance(validated, dict) or not validated.get("historical_case") or not _narrative_complete:
   506→            logger.warning(
   507→                "  validate_interface2 validated_interface_2 불완전(hallucination_check 토큰 초과 추정) → fallback 사용"
   508→            )
   509→            validated = fallback_validated
   510→
   511→        # narrative 섹션 필드 기본값 보장 (LLM 불완전 출력 방어: 누락 섹션 + None 필드)
   512→        _REQUIRED_NARRATIVE_SECTIONS = (
   513→            "background", "concept_explain", "history", "application", "caution", "summary"
   514→        )
   515→        if isinstance(validated, dict) and isinstance(validated.get("narrative"), dict):
   516→            narrative = validated["narrative"]
   517→            # 누락된 섹션 추가
   518→            for _key in _REQUIRED_NARRATIVE_SECTIONS:
   519→                if _key not in narrative or not isinstance(narrative.get(_key), dict):
   520→                    narrative[_key] = {}
   521→            # 각 섹션 필드 기본값 보장
   522→            for _sec in narrative.values():
   523→                if isinstance(_sec, dict):
   524→                    _sec.setdefault("purpose", "")
   525→                    _sec.setdefault("content", "")
   526→                    _sec.setdefault("bullets", [])
   527→
   528→        # summary는 텍스트 체크리스트 섹션으로 고정 (차트 생성 방지)
   529→        summary_section = validated.get("narrative", {}).get("summary")
   530→        if isinstance(summary_section, dict):
   531→            summary_section["viz_hint"] = None
   532→
   533→        # Pydantic 검증
   534→        raw_narr = RawNarrative.model_validate(validated)
   535→        logger.info("  validate_interface2 완료: overall_risk=%s", result.get("overall_risk"))
   536→
   537→        return {
   538→            "raw_narrative": raw_narr.model_dump(),
   539→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "validate_interface2", time.time() - node_start),
   540→        }
   541→
   542→    except Exception as e:
   543→        logger.error("  validate_interface2 실패: %s", e)
   544→        return {
   545→            "error": f"validate_interface2 실패: {e}",
   546→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "validate_interface2", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   547→        }
   548→

content.content:
1→"""Interface 3 노드: theme → pages → hallcheck → glossary → hallcheck → tone_final → sources → output.
     2→
     3→viz 브랜치 아키텍처 + jihoon v11 프롬프트 기반 10노드 순차 파이프라인.
     4→(chart_agent 2노드는 nodes/chart_agent.py에 별도 정의)
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from __future__ import annotations
     8→
     9→import json
    10→import logging
    11→import re
    12→import time
    13→from datetime import datetime
    14→from typing import Any
    15→
    16→from langsmith import traceable
    17→
    18→from ..ai.llm_utils import call_llm_with_prompt
    19→from ..config import COLOR_PALETTE, OUTPUT_DIR, SECTION_MAP
    20→from ..constants.home_icons import (
    21→    DEFAULT_HOME_ICON_KEY,
    22→    HOME_ICON_CANDIDATES,
    23→    HOME_ICON_KEYS,
    24→)
    25→from ..schemas import (
    26→    CuratedContext,
    27→    FinalBriefing,
    28→    FullBriefingOutput,
    29→    RawNarrative,
    30→)
    31→
    32→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    33→
    34→
    35→def _update_metrics(state: dict, node_name: str, elapsed: float, status: str = "success") -> dict:
    36→    metrics = dict(state.get("metrics") or {})
    37→    metrics[node_name] = {"elapsed_s": round(elapsed, 2), "status": status}
    38→    return metrics
    39→
    40→
    41→DEFAULT_STEP_TITLES: dict[int, str] = {
    42→    1: "왜 지금 중요할까",
    43→    2: "핵심 개념 한눈에",
    44→    3: "과거 패턴 되짚기",
    45→    4: "지금 시장에 대입",
    46→    5: "놓치면 위험한 점",
    47→    6: "투자 전 체크포인트",
    48→}
    49→LEGACY_STEP_TITLES = {"현재 배경", "금융 개념 설명", "과거 비슷한 사례", "현재 상황에 적용", "주의해야 할 점", "최종 정리"}
    50→
    51→DEFAULT_SECTION_HEADINGS: dict[int, tuple[str, str]] = {
    52→    1: ("지금 무슨 일이야?", "왜 중요할까?"),
    53→    2: ("개념 먼저 잡기", "지금 왜 필요할까?"),
    54→    3: ("과거에선 어땠을까?", "이번에 주는 힌트"),
    55→    4: ("닮은 점", "다른 점"),
    56→    5: ("리스크 먼저 보기", "대응 포인트"),
    57→}
    58→
    59→PLACEHOLDER_HEADING_PATTERNS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    60→    r"^\s*###\s*(?:소제목|접두사|heading|subheading|subtitle|title|제목)(?:\s*[:\-]?\s*\d+)?\s*[:\-]?\s*$",
    61→)
    62→
    63→JARGON_REPLACEMENTS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (
    64→    (r"\bCAPEX\b", "설비투자"),
    65→    (r"\bguidance\b", "실적 전망"),
    66→    (r"\bGUIDANCE\b", "실적 전망"),
    67→    (r"\b모멘텀\b", "흐름"),
    68→    (r"\b리레이팅\b", "재평가"),
    69→    (r"\b밸류체인\b", "공급망"),
    70→    (r"\b디스카운트\b", "저평가"),
    71→    (r"\b업사이드\b", "상승 여지"),
    72→    (r"\b다운사이드\b", "하락 위험"),
    73→    (r"\b타임 래그\b", "시차"),
    74→    (r"\bTime Lag\b", "시차"),
    75→)
    76→
    77→
    78→def _soften_text(text: str) -> str:
    79→    normalized = str(text or "").replace("\r\n", "\n")
    80→    if not normalized:
    81→        return normalized
    82→    for pattern, replacement in JARGON_REPLACEMENTS:
    83→        normalized = re.sub(pattern, replacement, normalized, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    84→    normalized = re.sub(r"[ \t]+", " ", normalized)
    85→    normalized = re.sub(r"\n{3,}", "\n\n", normalized)
    86→    normalized = "\n".join(line.strip() for line in normalized.split("\n"))
    87→    return normalized.strip()
    88→
    89→
    90→def _trim_title(title: str, step: int) -> str:
    91→    base = _soften_text(title)
    92→    if not base or len(base) > 18 or base in LEGACY_STEP_TITLES:
    93→        return DEFAULT_STEP_TITLES.get(step, "핵심 포인트")
    94→    return base
    95→
    96→
    97→def _extract_content_lines(content: str) -> list[str]:
    98→    text = (content or "").replace("\r\n", "\n")
    99→    lines: list[str] = []
   100→    for line in text.split("\n"):
   101→        cleaned = re.sub(r"^\s*(#{1,6}\s*|[-*]\s*|\d+[.)]\s*)", "", line).strip()
   102→        if cleaned:
   103→            lines.append(cleaned)
   104→    return lines
   105→
   106→
   107→def _has_placeholder_heading(content: str) -> bool:
   108→    text = str(content or "")
   109→    for line in text.splitlines():
   110→        for pattern in PLACEHOLDER_HEADING_PATTERNS:
   111→            if re.match(pattern, line, flags=re.IGNORECASE):
   112→                return True
   113→    return False
   114→
   115→
   116→def _contains_anchor(text: str, anchor: str) -> bool:
   117→    if not anchor:
   118→        return True
   119→    return anchor.strip().lower() in str(text or "").lower()
   120→
   121→
   122→def _contains_any_phrase(text: str, phrases: tuple[str, ...]) -> bool:
   123→    lowered = str(text or "").lower()
   124→    return any(phrase.lower() in lowered for phrase in phrases)
   125→
   126→
   127→def _purpose_is_reflected(purpose: str, content: str) -> bool:
   128→    purpose_clean = _soften_text(purpose)
   129→    if not purpose_clean:
   130→        return True
   131→
   132→    content_lower = str(content or "").lower()
   133→    tokens = re.findall(r"[가-힣A-Za-z0-9]{2,}", purpose_clean)
   134→    if not tokens:
   135→        return True
   136→    checks = tokens[:3]
   137→    return any(token.lower() in content_lower for token in checks)
   138→
   139→
   140→def _align_content_with_purpose(purpose: str, content: str) -> str:
   141→    text = _soften_text(content)
   142→    purpose_clean = _soften_text(purpose)
   143→    if not purpose_clean or _purpose_is_reflected(purpose_clean, text):
   144→        return text
   145→    return f"### 이 단계의 포인트\n{purpose_clean}\n\n{text}".strip()
   146→
   147→
   148→def _inject_markdown_sections(step: int, content: str) -> str:
   149→    text = _soften_text(content)
   150→    if re.search(r"^\s*###\s+", text, flags=re.MULTILINE) and not _has_placeholder_heading(text):
   151→        return text
   152→
   153→    heading1, heading2 = DEFAULT_SECTION_HEADINGS.get(step, ("핵심 포인트", "체크 포인트"))
   154→    if not text:
   155→        text = "관련 내용을 정리 중이에요."
   156→
   157→    lines = _extract_content_lines(text)
   158→    if len(lines) >= 2:
   159→        first = lines[0]
   160→        second = " ".join(lines[1:3])
   161→    else:
   162→        first = text
   163→        second = "핵심 흐름을 짧게 나눠서 보면 더 쉽게 이해할 수 있어요."
   164→
   165→    return f"### {heading1}\n{first}\n\n### {heading2}\n{second}"
   166→
   167→
   168→def _normalize_summary_content(content: str, bullets: list[str]) -> str:
   169→    collected: list[str] = []
   170→    for item in bullets or []:
   171→        if isinstance(item, str):
   172→            cleaned = _soften_text(item)
   173→            if cleaned and cleaned not in collected:
   174→                collected.append(cleaned)
   175→
   176→    for line in _extract_content_lines(content):
   177→        softened = _soften_text(line)
   178→        if softened not in collected:
   179→            collected.append(softened)
   180→        if len(collected) >= 3:
   181→            break
   182→
   183→    defaults = [
   184→        "핵심 지표가 같은 방향으로 움직이는지 확인해요.",
   185→        "실적 가이던스 변화가 실제 수치로 이어지는지 체크해요.",
   186→        "일정 지연이나 규제 변화 같은 변수 뉴스를 매일 확인해요.",
   187→    ]
   188→    for item in defaults:
   189→        if len(collected) >= 3:
   190→            break
   191→        if item not in collected:
   192→            collected.append(item)
   193→
   194→    checklist = "\n".join(f"- {item}" for item in collected[:3])
   195→    return f"### 투자 전에 꼭 확인할 포인트\n{checklist}"
   196→
   197→
   198→def _normalize_pages(pages: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   199→    if not isinstance(pages, list):
   200→        return []
   201→
   202→    normalized: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   203→
   204→    for page in pages:
   205→        if not isinstance(page, dict):
   206→            continue
   207→        current = dict(page)
   208→        raw_step = current.get("step", 0)
   209→        try:
   210→            step = int(raw_step or 0)
   211→        except (TypeError, ValueError):
   212→            step = 0
   213→        content = str(current.get("content", "") or "").strip()
   214→        bullets = current.get("bullets", [])
   215→        bullets = bullets if isinstance(bullets, list) else []
   216→        bullets = [_soften_text(str(item)) for item in bullets if str(item).strip()]
   217→        current["bullets"] = bullets
   218→
   219→        current["title"] = _trim_title(str(current.get("title", "") or ""), step)
   220→
   221→        if step == 6:
   222→            current["content"] = _normalize_summary_content(content, bullets)
   223→            current["chart"] = None
   224→        else:
   225→            current["content"] = _inject_markdown_sections(step, content)
   226→
   227→        normalized.append(current)
   228→
   229→    return normalized
   230→
   231→
   232→def _enforce_story_spine(pages: list[dict[str, Any]], raw_narrative: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   233→    if not isinstance(pages, list):
   234→        return []
   235→
   236→    concept = raw_narrative.get("concept") if isinstance(raw_narrative, dict) else {}
   237→    historical_case = raw_narrative.get("historical_case") if isinstance(raw_narrative, dict) else {}
   238→
   239→    concept_name = _soften_text(str((concept or {}).get("name", "") if isinstance(concept, dict) else ""))
   240→    concept_definition = _soften_text(str((concept or {}).get("definition", "") if isinstance(concept, dict) else ""))
   241→    concept_relevance = _soften_text(str((concept or {}).get("relevance", "") if isinstance(concept, dict) else ""))
   242→
   243→    hist_period = _soften_text(str((historical_case or {}).get("period", "") if isinstance(historical_case, dict) else ""))
   244→    hist_title = _soften_text(str((historical_case or {}).get("title", "") if isinstance(historical_case, dict) else ""))
   245→    hist_summary = _soften_text(str((historical_case or {}).get("summary", "") if isinstance(historical_case, dict) else ""))
   246→
   247→    enforced: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   248→    for page in pages:
   249→        if not isinstance(page, dict):
   250→            continue
   251→        current = dict(page)
   252→        raw_step = current.get("step", 0)
   253→        try:
   254→            step = int(raw_step or 0)
   255→        except (TypeError, ValueError):
   256→            step = 0
   257→        content = _soften_text(str(current.get("content", "") or ""))
   258→        purpose = _soften_text(str(current.get("purpose", "") or ""))
   259→
   260→        if step in {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} and (not re.search(r"^\s*###\s+", content, flags=re.MULTILINE) or _has_placeholder_heading(content)):
   261→            content = _inject_markdown_sections(step, content)
   262→
   263→        if step in {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}:
   264→            content = _align_content_with_purpose(purpose, content)
   265→
   266→        if step == 2 and concept_name and not _contains_anchor(content, concept_name):
   267→            concept_lines = [f"오늘 배울 개념은 {concept_name}이에요."]
   268→            if concept_definition:
   269→                concept_lines.append(concept_definition)
   270→            if concept_relevance:
   271→                concept_lines.append(concept_relevance)
   272→            concept_block = " ".join(line for line in concept_lines if line)
   273→            content = f"### 오늘 배울 개념\n{concept_block}\n\n{content}".strip()
   274→
   275→        if step == 3:
   276→            has_period = bool(hist_period) and _contains_anchor(content, hist_period)
   277→            has_title = bool(hist_title) and _contains_anchor(content, hist_title)
   278→            if (hist_period or hist_title) and not (has_period or has_title):
   279→                case_head = " ".join(part for part in [hist_period, hist_title] if part).strip()
   280→                case_body = hist_summary or "같은 개념이 작동한 과거 사례를 먼저 확인해요."
   281→                content = f"### 참고할 과거 사례\n{case_head}: {case_body}\n\n{content}".strip()
   282→
   283→        if step == 4 and not (
   284→            _contains_any_phrase(content, ("### 닮은 점", "닮은 점"))
   285→            and _contains_any_phrase(content, ("### 다른 점", "다른 점"))
   286→        ):
   287→            lines = _extract_content_lines(content)
   288→            similar = lines[0] if lines else "과거 사례와 닮은 흐름을 먼저 확인해요."
   289→            different = " ".join(lines[1:3]) if len(lines) > 1 else "이번 국면의 다른 변수도 함께 확인해야 해요."
   290→            content = f"### 닮은 점\n{similar}\n\n### 다른 점\n{different}".strip()
   291→
   292→        if step == 6:
   293→            bullets = current.get("bullets", [])
   294→            bullets = bullets if isinstance(bullets, list) else []
   295→            current["content"] = _normalize_summary_content(content, [_soften_text(str(item)) for item in bullets if str(item).strip()])
   296→            current["chart"] = None
   297→        else:
   298→            current["content"] = content
   299→
   300→        enforced.append(current)
   301→    return enforced
   302→

   478→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   479→# 4. run_glossary — page_glossaries
   480→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   481→
   482→@traceable(name="run_glossary", run_type="chain",
   483→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "용어 생성", "step": 4})
   484→def run_glossary_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   485→    """validated_pages → term extraction → search → page_glossaries."""
   486→    if state.get("error"):
   487→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   488→
   489→    node_start = time.time()
   490→    logger.info("[Node] run_glossary")
   491→
   492→    try:
   493→        raw = state["raw_narrative"]
   494→        validated = state.get("i3_validated")
   495→        if not validated:
   496→            logger.warning("  run_glossary: i3_validated is None. Using raw i3_pages.")
   497→            validated_pages = state.get("i3_pages", [])
   498→        else:
   499→            validated_pages = validated.get("validated_pages", [])
   500→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   501→
   502→        if backend == "mock":
   503→            page_glossaries = []
   504→            for step, _, section_key in SECTION_MAP:
   505→                page_glossaries.append({
   506→                    "step": step,
   507→                    "glossary": [
   508→                        {"term": f"용어-{section_key}", "definition": "mock 정의예요.", "domain": "일반"}
   509→                    ],
   510→                })
   511→            return {
   512→                "i3_glossaries": page_glossaries,
   513→                "i3_glossary_search_context": "[Mock Search Results]",
   514→                "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_glossary", time.time() - node_start),
   515→            }
   516→
   517→        # 1. Term Extraction
   518→        extraction_result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_glossary_term_extraction", {
   519→            "validated_pages": json.dumps(validated_pages, ensure_ascii=False),
   520→        })
   521→        terms_to_search = extraction_result.get("terms_to_search", [])
   522→        logger.info("  Extracted %d terms to search.", len(terms_to_search))
   523→
   524→        # 2. Web Search
   525→        from ..ai.tools import search_web_for_chart_data
   526→
   527→        search_results_text = ""
   528→        if terms_to_search:
   529→            unique_terms_map: dict[str, str] = {}
   530→            for item in terms_to_search:
   531→                term = item.get("term")
   532→                context = item.get("context_sentence", "")
   533→                if term and term not in unique_terms_map:
   534→                    unique_terms_map[term] = context
   535→
   536→            logger.info("  Searching for: %s", list(unique_terms_map.keys()))
   537→
   538→            search_docs: list[str] = []
   539→            for term, context in unique_terms_map.items():
   540→                try:
   541→                    if context:
   542→                        query = f"주식 용어 {term} 뜻 의미 (문맥: {context})"
   543→                    else:
   544→                        query = f"주식 용어 {term} 뜻 의미"
   545→
   546→                    search_output = search_web_for_chart_data.invoke(query)
   547→                    search_docs.append(f"[{term}]\n(문맥: {context})\n{search_output}\n")
   548→                except Exception as e:
   549→                    logger.warning("  Search failed for %s: %s", term, e)
   550→
   551→            search_results_text = "\n".join(search_docs)
   552→
   553→        if not search_results_text:
   554→            search_results_text = "(검색 결과 없음)"
   555→
   556→        # 3. Glossary Generation (search_results 포함)
   557→        result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_glossary", {
   558→            "validated_interface_2": json.dumps(raw, ensure_ascii=False),
   559→            "validated_pages": json.dumps(validated_pages, ensure_ascii=False),
   560→            "search_results": search_results_text,
   561→        })
   562→
   563→        glossary_count = sum(
   564→            len(pg.get("glossary", []))
   565→            for pg in result.get("page_glossaries", [])
   566→        )
   567→        logger.info("  run_glossary done: %d terms across 6 pages", glossary_count)
   568→
   569→        return {
   570→            "i3_glossaries": result.get("page_glossaries", []),
   571→            "i3_glossary_search_context": search_results_text,
   572→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_glossary", time.time() - node_start),
   573→        }
   574→
   575→    except Exception as e:
   576→        logger.error("  run_glossary failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   577→        return {
   578→            "error": f"run_glossary failed: {e}",
   579→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_glossary", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   580→        }
   581→
   582→
   583→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   584→# 5. run_hallcheck_glossary — validated_page_glossaries
   585→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   586→
   587→@traceable(name="run_hallcheck_glossary", run_type="llm",
   588→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "용어 검증", "step": 5})
   589→def run_hallcheck_glossary_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   590→    """page_glossaries 검증 → validated_page_glossaries 반환."""
   591→    if state.get("error"):
   592→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   593→
   594→    node_start = time.time()
   595→    logger.info("[Node] run_hallcheck_glossary")
   596→
   597→    try:
   598→        raw = state["raw_narrative"]
   599→        validated = state["i3_validated"]
   600→        validated_pages = validated.get("validated_pages", [])
   601→        i3_glossaries = state["i3_glossaries"]
   602→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   603→
   604→        if backend == "mock":
   605→            result = {
   606→                "overall_risk": "low",
   607→                "summary": "mock — 검증 미수행",
   608→                "issues": [],
   609→                "validated_page_glossaries": i3_glossaries,
   610→            }
   611→        else:
   612→            search_context = state.get("i3_glossary_search_context", "(검색 결과 없음)")
   613→            result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_hallcheck_glossary", {
   614→                "validated_interface_2": json.dumps(raw, ensure_ascii=False),
   615→                "validated_pages": json.dumps(validated_pages, ensure_ascii=False),
   616→                "page_glossaries": json.dumps(i3_glossaries, ensure_ascii=False),
   617→                "search_results": search_context,
   618→            })
   619→
   620→        risk = result.get("overall_risk", "unknown")
   621→        logger.info("  run_hallcheck_glossary done: risk=%s", risk)
   622→
   623→        return {
   624→            "i3_validated_glossaries": result.get("validated_page_glossaries", i3_glossaries),
   625→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_hallcheck_glossary", time.time() - node_start),
   626→        }
   627→
   628→    except Exception as e:
   629→        # hallcheck_glossary 실패 시 파이프라인을 죽이지 않고 원본 glossary로 fallback
   630→        # (토큰 초과로 JSON 잘림 등은 검증 품질 저하일 뿐, 콘텐츠 자체는 유효함)
   631→        logger.warning("  run_hallcheck_glossary 실패 → 원본 glossary fallback 사용: %s", e)
   632→        i3_glossaries = state.get("i3_glossaries") or []
   633→        return {
   634→            "i3_validated_glossaries": i3_glossaries,
   635→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_hallcheck_glossary", time.time() - node_start, "fallback"),
   636→        }
   637→
   638→
   639→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   640→# 6. run_tone_final — merge pages + glossaries, tone correction
   641→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   642→
   643→@traceable(name="run_tone_final", run_type="llm",
   644→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "톤 보정", "step": 6})
   645→def run_tone_final_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   646→    """validated pages + glossaries → final merged pages with tone correction."""
   647→    if state.get("error"):
   648→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   649→
   650→    node_start = time.time()
   651→    logger.info("[Node] run_tone_final")
   652→
   653→    try:
   654→        validated = state["i3_validated"]
   655→        validated_pages = validated.get("validated_pages", [])
   656→        validated_theme = validated.get("validated_theme", "")
   657→        validated_one_liner = validated.get("validated_one_liner", "")
   658→        validated_glossaries = state["i3_validated_glossaries"]
   659→        backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   660→
   661→        if backend == "mock":
   662→            glossary_map = {
   663→                pg["step"]: pg.get("glossary", [])
   664→                for pg in validated_glossaries
   665→            }
   666→            merged_pages = []
   667→            for page in validated_pages:
   668→                merged_page = dict(page)
   669→                merged_page["glossary"] = glossary_map.get(page["step"], [])
   670→                merged_pages.append(merged_page)
   671→
   672→            result = {
   673→                "interface_3_final_briefing": {
   674→                    "theme": validated_theme,
   675→                    "one_liner": validated_one_liner,
   676→                    "pages": merged_pages,
   677→                }
   678→            }
   679→        else:
   680→            result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_tone_final", {
   681→                "validated_theme": validated_theme,
   682→                "validated_one_liner": validated_one_liner,
   683→                "validated_pages": json.dumps(validated_pages, ensure_ascii=False),
   684→                "validated_page_glossaries": json.dumps(validated_glossaries, ensure_ascii=False),
   685→            })
   686→
   687→        briefing = result.get("interface_3_final_briefing", {})
   688→        normalized_pages = _normalize_pages(briefing.get("pages", []))
   689→        normalized_pages = _enforce_story_spine(normalized_pages, state.get("raw_narrative", {}))
   690→
   691→        # 페이지 손실 감지: LLM 응답 잘림 등으로 페이지 수 감소 시 fallback
   692→        if len(normalized_pages) < len(validated_pages):
   693→            logger.warning(
   694→                "  run_tone_final 페이지 손실(%d→%d) → validated_pages + glossary 직접 병합 fallback",
   695→                len(validated_pages), len(normalized_pages),
   696→            )
   697→            glossary_map = {pg["step"]: pg.get("glossary", []) for pg in validated_glossaries}
   698→            normalized_pages = _normalize_pages([
   699→                {**p, "glossary": glossary_map.get(p["step"], [])} for p in validated_pages
   700→            ])
   701→            normalized_pages = _enforce_story_spine(normalized_pages, state.get("raw_narrative", {}))
   702→
   703→        page_count = len(normalized_pages)
   704→        logger.info("  run_tone_final done: %d pages merged", page_count)
   705→
   706→        return {
   707→            "pages": normalized_pages,
   708→            "theme": _soften_text(briefing.get("theme", validated_theme)),
   709→            "one_liner": _soften_text(briefing.get("one_liner", validated_one_liner)),
   710→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_tone_final", time.time() - node_start),
   711→        }
   712→
   713→    except Exception as e:
   714→        logger.error("  run_tone_final failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   715→        return {
   716→            "error": f"run_tone_final failed: {e}",
   717→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_tone_final", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   718→        }
   719→
   720→
   721→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   722→# 7. run_home_icon_map — title/icon semantic mapping
   723→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   724→
   725→@traceable(name="run_home_icon_map", run_type="llm",
   726→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "홈 아이콘 매핑", "step": 7})
   727→def run_home_icon_map_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   728→    """theme/one_liner 기반 홈 카드 아이콘 key 선택."""
   729→    if state.get("error"):
   730→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   731→
   732→    node_start = time.time()
   733→    logger.info("[Node] run_home_icon_map")
   734→
   735→    fallback_icon = {"icon_key": DEFAULT_HOME_ICON_KEY}
   736→    backend = state.get("backend", "live")
   737→    theme = _soften_text(str(state.get("theme", "")))
   738→    one_liner = _soften_text(str(state.get("one_liner", "")))
   739→
   740→    if backend == "mock":
   741→        logger.info("  run_home_icon_map done (mock): %s", DEFAULT_HOME_ICON_KEY)
   742→        return {
   743→            "home_icon": fallback_icon,
   744→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_home_icon_map", time.time() - node_start),
   745→        }
   746→
   747→    try:
   748→        payload = {
   749→            "theme": theme,
   750→            "one_liner": one_liner,
   751→            "icon_candidates": json.dumps(HOME_ICON_CANDIDATES, ensure_ascii=False),
   752→            "previous_icon_key": "",
   753→        }
   754→        result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_home_icon_map", payload)
   755→        icon_key = _soften_text(str((result or {}).get("icon_key", "")))
   756→
   757→        if icon_key not in HOME_ICON_KEYS:
   758→            logger.warning(
   759→                "  run_home_icon_map invalid icon_key=%s (1st pass), retrying once",
   760→                icon_key or "<empty>",
   761→            )
   762→            retry_payload = dict(payload)
   763→            retry_payload["previous_icon_key"] = icon_key
   764→            retry_result = call_llm_with_prompt("3_home_icon_map", retry_payload)
   765→            icon_key = _soften_text(str((retry_result or {}).get("icon_key", "")))
   766→
   767→        if icon_key not in HOME_ICON_KEYS:
   768→            raise ValueError(f"invalid icon_key after retry: {icon_key}")
   769→
   770→        logger.info("  run_home_icon_map done: %s", icon_key)
   771→        return {
   772→            "home_icon": {"icon_key": icon_key},
   773→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_home_icon_map", time.time() - node_start),
   774→        }
   775→    except Exception as e:
   776→        logger.warning("  run_home_icon_map fallback: %s", e)
   777→        return {
   778→            "home_icon": fallback_icon,
   779→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "run_home_icon_map", time.time() - node_start, "fallback"),
   780→        }
   781→
   782→
   783→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   784→# 9. collect_sources — deterministic
   785→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   786→
   787→_STOPWORDS = frozenset({
   788→    "하는", "있는", "이는", "했다", "한다", "되는", "이다", "에서", "으로", "부터",
   789→    "까지", "하고", "그리고", "또한", "하며", "위해", "대한", "통해", "따르", "관련",
   790→    "지난", "오전", "오후", "현재", "기준", "대비", "전날", "거래", "거래일",
   791→})
   792→
   793→
   794→def _extract_keywords(text: str) -> list[str]:
   795→    """텍스트에서 핵심 키워드(2글자 이상 한글 단어) 추출."""
   796→    words = re.findall(r"[가-힣]{2,}", text)
   797→    return [w for w in words if w not in _STOPWORDS and len(w) >= 2]
   798→
   799→
   800→@traceable(name="collect_sources", run_type="tool",
   801→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "출처 수집", "step": 9})
   802→def collect_sources_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   803→    """출처 수집 (결정론적). chart_agent가 추가한 sources도 병합."""
   804→    if state.get("error"):
   805→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   806→
   807→    node_start = time.time()
   808→    logger.info("[Node] collect_sources")
   809→
   810→    try:
   811→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   812→        pages = state["pages"]
   813→
   814→        # verified_news에서 출처 추출
   815→        source_map: dict[str, dict] = {}
   816→        for news in curated.get("verified_news", []):
   817→            url = news.get("url", "")
   818→            source_name = news.get("source", "")
   819→            domain = url.split("//")[-1].split("/")[0] if "//" in url else url.split("/")[0]
   820→            domain = domain.replace("www.", "")
   821→
   822→            if source_name not in source_map:
   823→                source_map[source_name] = {
   824→                    "name": source_name,
   825→                    "url_domain": domain,
   826→                    "used_in_pages": [],
   827→                }
   828→
   829→        # 리포트에서 출처 추출
   830→        for report in curated.get("reports", []):
   831→            source_name = report.get("source", "")
   832→            if source_name and source_name not in source_map:
   833→                source_map[source_name] = {
   834→                    "name": source_name,
   835→                    "url_domain": "",
   836→                    "used_in_pages": [],
   837→                }
   838→
   839→        # 소스별 키워드 추출
   840→        source_keywords: dict[str, list[str]] = {}
   841→        for news in curated.get("verified_news", []):
   842→            sname = news.get("source", "")
   843→            text = f"{news.get('title', '')} {news.get('summary', '')}"
   844→            kws = _extract_keywords(text)
   845→            if sname not in source_keywords:
   846→                source_keywords[sname] = []
   847→            source_keywords[sname].extend(kws)
   848→
   849→        for report in curated.get("reports", []):
   850→            sname = report.get("source", "")
   851→            text = f"{report.get('title', '')} {report.get('summary', '')}"
   852→            kws = _extract_keywords(text)
   853→            if sname not in source_keywords:
   854→                source_keywords[sname] = []
   855→            source_keywords[sname].extend(kws)
   856→
   857→        # 페이지별 출처 매칭 (키워드 기반)
   858→        for page in pages:
   859→            page_text = page.get("content", "") + " " + " ".join(page.get("bullets", []))
   860→            for sname, sinfo in source_map.items():
   861→                keywords = source_keywords.get(sname, [])
   862→                match_count = sum(1 for kw in keywords if kw in page_text)
   863→                if match_count >= 2 and page["step"] not in sinfo["used_in_pages"]:
   864→                    sinfo["used_in_pages"].append(page["step"])
   865→
   866→        # used_in_pages가 비어있으면 1페이지 배정
   867→        sources = list(source_map.values())
   868→        for s in sources:
   869→            if not s["used_in_pages"]:
   870→                s["used_in_pages"] = [1]
   871→
   872→        # chart_agent가 추가한 sources 병합
   873→        chart_sources = state.get("sources") or []
   874→        for cs in chart_sources:
   875→            existing = next((s for s in sources if s["name"] == cs.get("name")), None)
   876→            if existing:
   877→                for pg in cs.get("used_in_pages", []):
   878→                    if pg not in existing["used_in_pages"]:
   879→                        existing["used_in_pages"].append(pg)
   880→            else:
   881→                sources.append(cs)
   882→
   883→        logger.info("  collect_sources done: %d sources", len(sources))
   884→        return {
   885→            "sources": sources,
   886→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "collect_sources", time.time() - node_start),
   887→        }
   888→
   889→    except Exception as e:
   890→        logger.error("  collect_sources failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   891→        return {
   892→            "error": f"collect_sources failed: {e}",
   893→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "collect_sources", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
   894→        }
   895→
   896→
   897→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   898→# 10. assemble_output — Pydantic validation + JSON save
   899→# ────────────────────────────────────────────
   900→
   901→@traceable(name="assemble_output", run_type="tool",
   902→           metadata={"phase": "interface_3", "phase_name": "최종 조립", "step": 10})
   903→def assemble_output_node(state: dict) -> dict:
   904→    """tone_final pages + charts 병합 → Pydantic 검증 → JSON 저장."""
   905→    if state.get("error"):
   906→        return {"error": state["error"]}
   907→
   908→    node_start = time.time()
   909→    logger.info("[Node] assemble_output")
   910→
   911→    try:
   912→        raw_narrative = state["raw_narrative"]
   913→        curated = state["curated_context"]
   914→        pages = state["pages"]
   915→        charts = state.get("charts") or {}
   916→        sources = state.get("sources", [])
   917→        checklist = state.get("hallucination_checklist") or []
   918→        home_icon = state.get("home_icon") or {"icon_key": DEFAULT_HOME_ICON_KEY}
   919→        crawl_news_status = state.get("crawl_news_status")
   920→        crawl_research_status = state.get("crawl_research_status")
   921→        theme = state.get("theme", raw_narrative["theme"])
   922→        one_liner = state.get("one_liner", raw_narrative["one_liner"])
   923→
   924→        # charts를 pages에 병합
   925→        for page in pages:
   926→            step = page["step"]
   927→            if step == 6:
   928→                page["chart"] = None
   929→                continue
   930→            section_key = next(
   931→                (sk for s, _, sk in SECTION_MAP if s == step), None
   932→            )
   933→            if section_key and charts.get(section_key):
   934→                page["chart"] = charts[section_key]
   935→            elif "chart" not in page:
   936→                page["chart"] = None
   937→
   938→        # pages 방어 정규화: None 필드를 기본값으로 교체 (LLM 폴백 출력이 null을 넘길 수 있음)
   939→        for page in pages:
   940→            if not isinstance(page.get("glossary"), list):
   941→                page["glossary"] = []
   942→            # glossary 아이템 내 None 필드를 빈 문자열로 교체
   943→            for item in page["glossary"]:
   944→                if isinstance(item, dict):
   945→                    if item.get("term") is None:
   946→                        item["term"] = ""
   947→                    if item.get("definition") is None:
   948→                        item["definition"] = ""
   949→                    if item.get("domain") is None:
   950→                        item["domain"] = ""
   951→            if not isinstance(page.get("bullets"), list):
   952→                page["bullets"] = []
   953→
   954→        # FinalBriefing 조립
   955→        final_briefing_data = {
   956→            "theme": theme,
   957→            "one_liner": one_liner,
   958→            "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
   959→            "pages": pages,
   960→            "home_icon": home_icon,
   961→            "sources": sources,
   962→            "hallucination_checklist": checklist,
   963→        }
   964→        data_collection_status = None
   965→        if isinstance(crawl_news_status, dict) or isinstance(crawl_research_status, dict):
   966→            data_collection_status = {
   967→                "crawl_news": crawl_news_status if isinstance(crawl_news_status, dict) else None,
   968→                "crawl_research": crawl_research_status if isinstance(crawl_research_status, dict) else None,
   969→            }
   970→
   971→        # Pydantic 검증
   972→        output = FullBriefingOutput(
   973→            topic=theme,
   974→            interface_1_curated_context=CuratedContext.model_validate(curated),
   975→            interface_2_raw_narrative=RawNarrative.model_validate(raw_narrative),
   976→            interface_3_final_briefing=FinalBriefing.model_validate(final_briefing_data),
   977→            data_collection_status=data_collection_status,
   978→        )
   979→
   980→        # 파일 저장
   981→        OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   982→        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
   983→        output_path = OUTPUT_DIR / f"briefing_{timestamp}.json"
   984→        output_path.write_text(
   985→            json.dumps(output.model_dump(), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False),
   986→            encoding="utf-8",
   987→        )
   988→
   989→        logger.info("  assemble_output done: %s", output_path)
   990→        return {
   991→            "full_output": output.model_dump(),
   992→            "output_path": str(output_path),
   993→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "assemble_output", time.time() - node_start),
   994→        }
   995→
   996→    except Exception as e:
   997→        logger.error("  assemble_output failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   998→        return {
   999→            "error": f"assemble_output failed: {e}",
  1000→            "metrics": _update_metrics(state, "assemble_output", time.time() - node_start, "failed"),
  1001→        }
  1002→

data.prompt:
Explore the datapipeline code to identify all defensive/fallback patterns and potential failure points. Focus on:

1. `datapipeline/nodes/interface2.py` - Look at `validate_interface2` node, specifically:
   - The fallback logic when hallucination_check fails
   - How `RawNarrative.model_validate()` is called
   - What defensive defaults exist for narrative sections
   - The `_REQUIRED_NARRATIVE_SECTIONS` tuple if it exists

2. `datapipeline/nodes/interface3.py` - Look at `assemble_output_node`:
   - The pages normalization code (glossary, bullets defaults)
   - How individual glossary items are handled (do they check for None definition/domain fields?)
   - The `FinalBriefing.model_validate()` call

3. `datapipeline/prompts/templates/3_tone_final.md` - Check the max_tokens setting

4. `datapipeline/prompts/templates/hallucination_check.md` - Check the max_tokens setting

5. `datapipeline/ai/llm_utils.py` - Look at JSON retry/repair logic and token limit handling

6. `datapipeline/schemas.py` - Check the Pydantic models for FinalBriefing, NarrativeBody, NarrativeSection, GlossaryItem to understand required vs optional fields

Report all findings in detail including line numbers.

content.content:
1→---
     2→provider: anthropic
     3→model: claude-sonnet-4-6
     4→max_tokens: 8000
     5→temperature: 0.2
     6→response_format: json_object
     7→---
     8→당신은 `interface_3_final_briefing` 최종 톤 보정 및 병합기입니다.
     9→검증 완료된 모든 데이터를 입력으로 받아 최종 `interface_3_final_briefing` JSON을 생성하세요.
    10→
    11→[Validated Theme & One-liner — 3단계 검증 완료]
    12→theme: {{validated_theme}}
    13→one_liner: {{validated_one_liner}}
    14→
    15→[Validated Pages — 3단계 검증 완료]
    16→{{validated_pages}}
    17→
    18→[Validated Page Glossaries — 5단계 검증 완료]
    19→{{validated_page_glossaries}}
    20→
    21→---
    22→
    23→## 병합 및 톤 보정 원칙
    24→
    25→### 1. 병합 규칙
    26→- `validated_pages`의 각 페이지에 `validated_page_glossaries`의 해당 `step` glossary를 삽입해요.
    27→- 최종 구조: 각 페이지 = `step` + `title` + `purpose` + `content` + `bullets` + `glossary`
    28→
    29→### 2. 톤 보정 규칙 (Tone Guide 적용)
    30→**아래 톤 가이드를 기준으로 모든 텍스트를 재작성/보정하세요.**
    31→{{include:_tone_guide}}
    32→
    33→**추가 금지/교정 규칙:**
    34→- **해요체 필수**: 모든 문장은 `~해요`, `~예요/이에요`, `~거든요` 등으로 끝나야 해요.
    35→- **금지 어미**: `~합니다`, `~입니다`, `~됩니다`, `~습니까?`, `~하였다`, `~한다`, `~이다` 발견 시 즉시 해요체로 수정해요.
    36→- **자연스러운 연결**: 6개 페이지가 하나의 이야기처럼 자연스럽게 이어지도록 접속사와 흐름을 다듬어요.
    37→- **반복 제거**: "주목할 점은", "살펴보면" 같은 상투적 표현이 반복되지 않도록 다양화해요.
    38→
    39→### 3. 안전 최종 점검
    40→- 투자 권고 표현(`매수`, `매도`, `비중`, `진입`, `청산`, `추천`)이 어디에도 없는지 확인해요.
    41→- 수치/날짜/고유명사가 입력 데이터와 일치하는지 최종 확인해요.
    42→
    43→---
    44→
    45→## 출력 스키마 (고정)
    46→
    47→```json
    48→{
    49→  "interface_3_final_briefing": {
    50→    "theme": "string",
    51→    "one_liner": "string",
    52→    "pages": [
    53→      {
    54→        "step": 1,
    55→        "title": "string",
    56→        "purpose": "string",
    57→        "content": "string",
    58→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
    59→        "glossary": [
    60→          {
    61→            "term": "string",
    62→            "definition": "string",
    63→            "domain": "string"
    64→          }
    65→        ]
    66→      },
    67→      {
    68→        "step": 2,
    69→        "title": "string",
    70→        "purpose": "string",
    71→        "content": "string",
    72→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
    73→        "glossary": []
    74→      },
    75→      {
    76→        "step": 3,
    77→        "title": "string",
    78→        "purpose": "string",
    79→        "content": "string",
    80→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
    81→        "glossary": []
    82→      },
    83→      {
    84→        "step": 4,
    85→        "title": "string",
    86→        "purpose": "string",
    87→        "content": "string",
    88→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
    89→        "glossary": []
    90→      },
    91→      {
    92→        "step": 5,
    93→        "title": "string",
    94→        "purpose": "string",
    95→        "content": "string",
    96→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
    97→        "glossary": []
    98→      },
    99→      {
   100→        "step": 6,
   101→        "title": "string",
   102→        "purpose": "string",
   103→        "content": "string",
   104→        "bullets": ["string", "string"],
   105→        "glossary": []
   106→      }
   107→    ]
   108→  }
   109→}
   110→```
   111→
   112→## 출력 규칙
   113→
   114→1. JSON 객체만 출력해요. (설명 문장, 코드블록, 주석 금지)
   115→2. 최상위 키는 정확히 `interface_3_final_briefing`만 사용해요.
   116→3. `pages` 배열은 정확히 6개 객체를 포함해요.
   117→4. `chart` 필드는 포함하지 않아요.
   118→5. 각 페이지의 `glossary`는 검증된 용어만 포함하며, 없으면 빈 배열(`[]`)로 넣어요.
   119→6. 모든 텍스트는 해요체로 통일해요.
   120→

1→---
     2→provider: anthropic
     3→model: claude-sonnet-4-6
     4→temperature: 0.1
     5→max_tokens: 6000
     6→response_format: json_object
     7→system_message: >
     8→  당신은 금융 콘텐츠 팩트체커입니다. 정확성과 일관성을 최우선으로 검증합니다.
     9→---
    10→당신은 `interface_2_raw_narrative` 전용 팩트체커입니다.
    11→`page_purpose_output`, `historical_case_output`, `narrative_output`을
    12→`curated_context` 기준으로 검증하고, 수정 반영된 `validated_interface_2`를 반환하세요.
    13→
    14→[Interface 1 — Curated Context]
    15→{{curated_context}}
    16→
    17→[Page Purpose Output]
    18→{{page_purpose_output}}
    19→
    20→[Historical Case Output]
    21→{{historical_case_output}}
    22→
    23→[Narrative Output]
    24→{{narrative_output}}
    25→
    26→---
    27→
    28→## 검증 원칙
    29→
    30→1. 기준 데이터는 `curated_context`를 최우선으로 사용해요.
    31→2. 아래 항목을 모두 검사해요.
    32→- 수치(가격, 퍼센트, 금액, 비율)
    33→- 날짜/기간
    34→- 고유명사(기업명, 기관명, 이벤트명)
    35→- 인과관계 주장
    36→- 출력물 간 정합성(theme/one_liner/concept/history 연결)
    37→3. 근거가 없거나 상충되는 내용은 `unverified` 또는 `hallucination`으로 분류해요.
    38→4. 투자 권고 표현(`매수`, `매도`, `비중`, `진입`, `청산`, `추천`)이 발견되면 경고 이상으로 기록해요.
    39→
    40→---
    41→
    42→## 판정 기준
    43→
    44→### verdict
    45→- `verified`: curated_context 근거와 일치
    46→- `approximate`: 근사치이며 문맥상 허용 가능
    47→- `unverified`: curated_context에서 근거를 찾을 수 없음
    48→- `hallucination`: 근거와 명확히 충돌하거나 허구
    49→
    50→### severity
    51→- `info`: 문장 다듬기 수준
    52→- `warning`: 사실성/정합성에 유의미한 위험
    53→- `critical`: 명백한 허위, 큰 수치 오류, 핵심 논리 붕괴
    54→
    55→### overall_risk 규칙
    56→1. `critical`이 1건 이상이면 `overall_risk`는 최소 `high`여야 해요.
    57→2. `critical`이 2건 이상이거나 핵심 필드(theme/concept/historical_case)에 중대한 허위가 있으면 `critical`로 올려요.
    58→
    59→---
    60→
    61→## 교정 지침
    62→
    63→1. `issues.fix`는 실제 대체 가능한 수정안을 써요.
    64→2. `validated_interface_2`에는 수정 반영된 최종 구조를 넣어요.
    65→3. `validated_interface_2` 키 이름은 아래 계약과 100% 일치해야 해요.
    66→- `theme`
    67→- `one_liner`
    68→- `concept`
    69→- `historical_case`
    70→- `narrative`
    71→
    72→---
    73→
    74→## 출력 스키마 (고정)
    75→
    76→```json
    77→{
    78→  "overall_risk": "low|medium|high|critical",
    79→  "summary": "string",
    80→  "issues": [
    81→    {
    82→      "component": "page_purpose|historical_case|narrative",
    83→      "field_path": "string",
    84→      "claim": "string",
    85→      "evidence_in_curated_context": "string or null",
    86→      "verdict": "verified|approximate|unverified|hallucination",
    87→      "severity": "info|warning|critical",
    88→      "fix": "string"
    89→    }
    90→  ],
    91→  "consistency_checks": [
    92→    {
    93→      "type": "cross_component_consistency|timeline_consistency|numeric_consistency",
    94→      "severity": "warning|critical",
    95→      "description": "string",
    96→      "fix": "string"
    97→    }
    98→  ],
    99→  "validated_interface_2": {
   100→    "theme": "string",
   101→    "one_liner": "string",
   102→    "concept": {
   103→      "name": "string",
   104→      "definition": "string",
   105→      "relevance": "string"
   106→    },
   107→    "historical_case": {
   108→      "period": "string",
   109→      "title": "string",
   110→      "summary": "string",
   111→      "outcome": "string",
   112→      "lesson": "string"
   113→    },
   114→    "narrative": {}
   115→  }
   116→}
   117→```
   118→
   119→## 출력 규칙
   120→
   121→1. JSON 객체만 출력해요. (설명 문장, 코드블록, 주석 금지)
   122→2. 검증 이슈가 없으면 `issues`와 `consistency_checks`를 빈 배열로 반환해요.
   123→3. `validated_interface_2`는 반드시 완전한 형태로 반환해요. (부분 누락 금지)
   124→
